source: SRS Cause of Death Statistics 2022-2024 (Report on Causes of Death in India)
publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI), Sample Registration System
extractedFrom: Table 2.1A (Distribution of Deaths by Major Cause Groups, India) p.12; Executive Summary leading-cause list / Table 2.3A (Top 10 Causes of Death, all ages)
method: Verbal-autopsy cause assignment on the SRS sample. Unlike MCCD (only ~22% medically certified, urban/institutional), SRS-CoD is nationally representative and covers rural and at-home deaths. Most ill-defined causes are at ages 70+.

broadGroups.note: Share of all deaths, %, by major cause group.

priorPeriod_2021_2023.note: Source's own previous-period figures, showing NCDs rising and communicable falling.

context.note: NCD burden is higher in richer 'Other' states (63.5%) than poorer EAG states + Assam (53.9%); ill-defined causes concentrate at ages 70+.
